product_overview: Mobile application enabling doctors to authenticate, manage appointments and prescriptions (including PDF export/share), chat with patients in real time with patient context, and send/receive push notifications through a server-side notification pipeline.
core_goals: Provide secure doctor authentication with role-based access and doctor profile verification in Firestore
Enable creation, storage, export and sharing of prescriptions from appointment details (PDF generation + share)
Support real-time chat between doctor and patient with patient context and anti-spam controls
Deliver reliable push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging with token persistence, foreground/background handling, and tap payload handling

features.name: Authentication and Role Guard
features.description: Allow doctors to sign in and verify their role/profile in Firestore before granting access to doctor-only screens and flows.
user_flows: POST /firebase_auth.signInWithEmailAndPassword with email/password -> Receive 200 with idToken and uid -> GET /firestore/users/{uid} -> Receive 200 with user document containing role: "doctor" and doctorProfile -> Return success and allow navigation to doctor home
POST /firebase_auth.signInWithEmailAndPassword with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error -> Surface authentication error to user and do not fetch user document

POST /firebase_auth.signInWithEmailAndPassword with email/password -> Receive 200 with idToken and uid -> GET /firestore/users/{uid} -> Receive 200 with user document role != "doctor" or missing doctorProfile -> Return 403 Role Mismatch and deny access to doctor-only screens

features.name: Appointment Prescription Workflow
features.description: From an appointment, doctors can create and save prescriptions (medicines + notes), generate a PDF, and share/export the prescription.
user_flows: GET /firestore/appointments/{appointmentId} with doctor id token -> Receive 200 with appointment details -> POST /firestore/appointments/{appointmentId}/prescriptions with medicines and notes -> Receive 201 with prescriptionId -> POST /pdf/generate with prescriptionId and prescription data -> Receive 200 with PDF binary -> POST /app/share with PDF binary -> Receive 200 Share success
GET /firestore/appointments/{appointmentId} with invalid/expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Abort flow and prompt doctor to re-authenticate

POST /firestore/appointments/{appointmentId}/prescriptions with invalid/missing required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors -> Surface validation messages and prevent prescription save
POST /pdf/generate with prescriptionId when PDF service fails -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error -> Provide retry option and allow saving prescription data without PDF

features.name: Chat and Patient Context
features.description: Real-time chat between doctor and patient with quick access to patient details from chat header and anti-spam controls to throttle messages.
user_flows: GET /firestore/chats?doctorId={doctorId} with doctor token -> Receive 200 with list of chat summaries -> GET /firestore/chats/{chatId}/messages?limit=50 -> Receive 200 with recent messages -> GET /firestore/patients/{patientId} -> Receive 200 with patient profile -> POST /firestore/chats/{chatId}/messages with message content and doctor id -> Receive 201 message created
POST /firestore/chats/{chatId}/messages without auth token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Block message send and prompt for authentication

POST /firestore/chats/{chatId}/messages with timestamps indicating message rate exceeded -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests (rate_limited) -> Apply anti-spam throttle and notify doctor about sending limit
GET /firestore/chats/{chatId}/messages with network error -> Receive network error/timeout -> Surface 'cannot load messages' and allow user to retry

features.name: Notification Delivery Pipeline
features.description: Persist device FCM tokens, send push notifications via a Cloud Function (/sendNotification), and handle display and tap payloads in-app (foreground/background/local display).
user_flows: POST /firestore/users/{uid}/fcmTokens with fcm_token and device metadata -> Receive 200 token persisted -> POST /sendNotification with body { userId, title, body, data } -> Cloud Function looks up tokens and calls FCM -> Receive 200 success -> POST /app/localNotification/display with FCM payload (foreground handler) -> Receive 200 displayed
POST /sendNotification with missing title or body -> Receive 400 Bad Request from Cloud Function -> Return error to caller and do not call FCM
POST /sendNotification with non-existent userId -> Receive 404 User Not Found from Cloud Function -> Return error to caller

POST /sendNotification where downstream FCM returns invalid/expired token -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error or 410 Unregistered token from Cloud Function -> Cloud Function responds with failure and client logs/cleans up token

POST /app/navigation/handleNotificationTap with notification payload -> Receive 200 with navigation action when deep-link mapping exists -> App navigates to target screen; otherwise Receive 404/unhandled -> App falls back to inbox/home screen (known limitation)

tech_stack: Firebase Auth / Cloud Messaging / Local Notifications

features.name: Authentication and Role Guard
features.description: Doctor login flow with role checks and doctor profile verification in Firestore.

features.name: Appointment Prescription Workflow
features.description: Doctors can manage medicines, notes, and export/share prescriptions as PDF from appointment details.

features.name: Chat and Patient Context
features.description: Real-time doctor-patient chat with anti-spam controls and patient detail access from chat header.

features.name: Notification Delivery Pipeline
features.description: Push notifications with foreground/background handlers, local notification display, token persistence, and tap payload handling.

endpoints.description: Sends FCM notification to target user token from Cloud Function.

known_limitations.issue: Notification tap routing is currently log/fallback based and not wired to a global navigation key.
known_limitations.impact: Tapping notifications may not deep-link to a specific screen yet.
